chunks.text: Human Resources Staff - EECS at Berkeley. Human Resources Staff. Human Resources Contacts: payroll@eecs.berkeley.edu for all payroll and benefits-related questions. Research (ERSO) HR & Payroll: eecs-visitor-coordinator@eecs.berkeley.edu for support for postdocs, invited visiting scholars/researchers, visiting industrial fellows.
chunks.question: What are the email contacts for HR staff at EECS?

chunks.text: EECS ASE Program Manager: Hamilton Chang, located at 313 Soda Hall, contact +1 (510) 642-0544, email hamiltonchang@eecs.berkeley.edu. Coordinates departmental HR/payroll matters, staff hires, recruitment in TAM, and student on-boarding; consults on accounting projects.
chunks.question: Who is the EECS ASE Program Manager and what do they do?
chunks.answer: Hamilton Chang coordinates HR, payroll, and recruitment.

chunks.text: Visiting EECS Scholar and Postdoc Affairs: Support for postdocs, invited visiting scholars/researchers, visiting industrial fellows, and other Engineering Research Support Organization (ERSO) appointments in EECS. Contact: eecs-visitor-coordinator@eecs.berkeley.edu.
chunks.question: What does Visiting EECS Scholar and Postdoc Affairs provide?
chunks.answer: Support for postdocs and visiting researchers.
